en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR) in the Canada Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR) Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Canada Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR)
Please upload your  Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR).
Please enter the issue date of your  Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR).
Please enter the expiration date as 1 or 2 years after the issue date depending on your safety rating.
Please enter the expiration date of your Commercial Vehicle Operator's Registration Certificate (CVOR).
